description: **Native desktop update bridge.** New `wesktop.runtime_bridge` module lets a desktop host react to fastware build changes: `reload(window)`, best-effort `clear_web_cache(window)`, `fetch_build_id(url)`, `check_and_reload(...)` (reloads on a DIFFERENT build id), and `install_focus_poll(...)` which polls the version endpoint on window focus where pywebview exposes one. `run()` now captures the native window handle and wires the bridge.
